name: BMO Bank
description_short: North America's 8th largest bank by assets. Checking accounts, mortgages, HELOCs, and business banking across 994 branches in 8 states. FDIC insured, 12M+ customers.
description_long:
BMO Bank (formerly BMO Harris Bank) is North America's eighth largest bank by assets, serving more than 12 million customers through personal and commercial banking, wealth management, and investment services. The bank holds approximately $252 billion in total assets and operates 994 branch locations across Illinois, Wisconsin, Indiana, Minnesota, Kansas, Missouri, Arizona, and Florida.

For personal banking, BMO offers several checking account options including the Smart Money checking account (no monthly fees with qualifying activities), Premier checking (premium features with higher balance requirements), and Smart Advantage checking. Each account comes with online and mobile banking, bill pay, and access to BMO's ATM network.

BMO's lending products include competitive mortgage rates for home purchases and refinancing, home equity loans and lines of credit (HELOCs), personal loans, and auto loans. Their mortgage products serve both first-time homebuyers and experienced homeowners looking to refinance or tap home equity.

For business customers, BMO provides business checking accounts, business credit cards, commercial lending, and treasury management services. The bank has a strong reputation in the Midwest commercial banking market.

BMO was established in 1947 and is FDIC insured, meaning deposits are protected up to $250,000 per depositor. The bank is a subsidiary of BMO Financial Group, a publicly traded Canadian multinational (NYSE: BMO, TSX: BMO) with a market capitalization of over $60 billion.

Consumers considering BMO should note that while the bank offers competitive rates and a full suite of products, its branch network is concentrated in 8 states — primarily the Midwest. For consumers outside these states, BMO's digital banking platform is available but the in-person experience is limited. Customer service reviews are mixed, typical of large national banks.

tiers.name: Smart Money Checking
features: No monthly fee with qualifying activities

pros: North America's 8th largest bank by assets — $1T+ across operations, 12M+ customers
994 branch locations across 8 US states for in-person banking
Full-service banking: checking, savings, mortgages, HELOCs, personal loans, business banking
FDIC insured — deposits protected up to $250,000 per depositor
Competitive mortgage and HELOC rates from a major national bank
Strong digital banking platform with mobile app, Zelle, and bill pay
BBB A+ rated with over 140 years of banking history (founded 1882)
Publicly traded parent (NYSE: BMO, TSX: BMO) — transparent and regulated
cons: Branch network limited to 8 states (primarily Midwest)
Not specifically focused on subprime or credit-building products
Monthly fees on some checking accounts without qualifying activities
Fewer locations than megabanks like Chase or Bank of America
best_for: Consumers in IL, WI, IN, MN, KS, MO, AZ, or FL who want a major bank with local branches
First-time homebuyers looking for mortgage options
Homeowners seeking HELOCs or home equity loans
Small business owners needing commercial banking services
People who want a checking account from an established, FDIC-insured institution
diagnosis: BMO Bank is a top-tier, full-service national bank — North America's 8th largest by assets with 994 branches across 8 US states. Offers the complete range of personal and business banking: checking accounts, mortgages (fixed, ARM, jumbo, low down payment), HELOCs, personal loans, auto loans, business banking, and wealth management. BBB A+ rated, FDIC insured, publicly traded (NYSE: BMO). Best for consumers in IL, WI, IN, MN, KS, MO, AZ, or FL who want a major bank with both physical branches and modern digital banking.

products_services.name: Checking Accounts
products_services.description: Smart Money (no monthly fee with qualifying activities), Premier (premium features, relationship pricing), and Smart Advantage checking. All include online/mobile banking, bill pay, and BMO ATM access.

products_services.name: Mortgages
products_services.description: Fixed rate, adjustable rate, jumbo, low down payment, and cross-border mortgages for home purchase and refinance.

products_services.name: Home Equity Loans & HELOCs
products_services.description: Home equity loans with fixed rates and home equity lines of credit with variable rates. Access your home's equity for renovations, debt consolidation, or major expenses.

products_services.name: Personal Loans & Lines of Credit
products_services.description: Personal installment loans and revolving lines of credit for large purchases, debt consolidation, or unexpected expenses.

products_services.name: Auto, Boat & RV Loans
products_services.description: Vehicle financing for new and used cars, boats, and recreational vehicles.

products_services.name: Business Banking
products_services.description: Business checking, business credit cards, SBA loans, commercial lending, and treasury management for small to mid-size businesses.

products_services.name: Wealth Management
products_services.description: Financial planning, investment advisory, retirement planning, and portfolio management through BMO Wealth Management.

services: Checking accounts (Smart Money, Premier, Smart Advantage)
Home equity loans and lines of credit (HELOCs)
typical_results_timeline: Checking accounts can be opened online in minutes. Mortgage pre-approval typically takes 1-3 business days. HELOC applications are processed within 7-14 business days.
